name: Mexican Yuletide Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter until smooth.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, beating constantly.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla extract.
4. Mix in the salt, flour, oatmeal, and pecans.
5. Shape rounded teaspoonfuls of dough into balls.
6. Place the balls on an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for about 20 minutes.
8. Roll the cookies in powdered sugar while they are still warm.
Makes about 6 dozen cookies
